prestazioni: B58B30C (3.0L I6) forced induction upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (106mm compressor wheel, 76mm turbine, 1.32 A/R housing) paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 650whp on E85 with a Motec M150 ECU managing fueling via Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover system (DFV 2-way adjustable dampers, 80mm stroke, 12-position rebound/compression) with custom valving for the GR Supra's multi-link rear suspension, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm hollow, 3-position) and polyurethane subframe bushings from 034 Motorsport

AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front brake kit (405mm two-piece rotors, RST-1 pads) with Motul RBF660 brake fluid, paired with a custom stainless steel brake line kit from Hose Techniques and a Tilton 76-series hydraulic clutch master cylinder for aggressive track use
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and exposed carbon weave accents, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon with integrated venting for the GTX5533R turbo

Custom 3D-printed front splitter from APR Performance (GT-250 model, extended 3 inches for aero balance) with integrated canards from Verus Engineering, paired with a custom carbon fiber rear wing from 9 Lives Racing (2000mm chord, 300mm height, adjustable angle)

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SPG XL seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) mounted on custom Bride seat rails, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, T45 steel, bolt-in design with integrated harness bar)
